CPVI_I.Description: Chronic Pain Values Inventory (CPVI) importance score, 0-30

CPVI_S.Description: Chronic Pain Values Inventory (CPVI) success score, 0-30

CPVI_D.Description: Chronic Pain Values Inventory (CPVI) discrepancy between importance and success scores, -30-30

CPAQ_T.Description: Chronic Pain Acceptance Questionnaire (CPAQ) total score, 0-120

CPAQ_AE.Description: Chronic Pain Acceptance Questionnaire (CPAQ) active engagement score, 0-66

CPAQ_PW.Description: Chronic Pain Acceptance Questionnaire (CPAQ) pain willingness score, 0-54
